This directory vendors third-party source archives used by CMake `ExternalProject` builds.

- `open_jtalk-1.11.tar.gz`
  Source: `https://downloads.sourceforge.net/project/open-jtalk/Open%20JTalk/open_jtalk-1.11/open_jtalk-1.11.tar.gz`
  SHA256: `20fdc6aeb6c757866034abc175820573db43e4284707c866fcd02c8ec18de71f`
- `hts_engine_API-1.10.tar.gz`
  Source: `https://downloads.sourceforge.net/project/hts-engine/hts_engine%20API/hts_engine_API-1.10/hts_engine_API-1.10.tar.gz`
  SHA256: `e2132be5860d8fb4a460be766454cfd7c3e21cf67b509c48e1804feab14968f7`

They are committed to keep CI reproducible when external mirrors are unavailable.
